TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-frog_api2

S.FORM: quwanay zinna ya.
yau a sunis a yau zinna haw.
qmudu tu wasu kinausa tu wasuna zinna nani.
yau a biyatna qudu na ta puduqan zinna.
S.TRANSL: 有一隻他的青蛙在甕裡。
There is his frog in an urn.

S.FORM: tapeRaskuan nani.
tuRabi maynep ti ya sunis a yau nani.
wasu a yau nani yau ti zinna mawRat ngid qawRat ta biyatna zinna tapuduqan zinna nani.
S.TRANSL: (The child) wanted to play with his frog in the urn.

S.FORM: sunis a yau mai ngid qaynep nani kaw.
S.TRANSL: The child didn’t want to sleep.

S.FORM: qaswat pa ita.
yau a wasuta tmaita tu biyat ta puduqan.
S.TRANSL: 我們的狗去看瓶子裡的青蛙。
Our dog went to see the frog in the bottle.

S.FORM: zinna ti na tapeRaskuan zinna ti na sunis a yau zinna nani maswat ti ya sunis a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 他說, 在瓶子裡, 他說那個小孩, 他說, 小孩起來了。
He said, in the bottle, he said that the child... He said the child got up.

S.FORM: yau ti tmayta tu biyatna zinna nani.
yau biyat a yau nani nengi taytaanna biyat a yau mai maynaR qaya biyat a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 看青蛙很好, 青蛙沒有醒過來。
He saw that the frog was good. The frog didn’t wake up.

S.FORM: a mlingi ta biyatna ya sunis a yau zinna.
S.TRANSL: The child was beside the frog.

S.FORM: aizipna atu wasuna zinna haw.
wani biyat a yau nani.
mRaRiw ti zinna ya mudsit ti zinna biyat a yau.
mudsit tapeRaskuan zinna.
S.TRANSL: The frog ran out from the bottle.

S.FORM: ngid ti paRaRiw a ya biyat a yau zinna nani.
S.TRANSL: The frog wanted to run away.

S.FORM: wani sunis a yau maynep zinna nani.
S.TRANSL: 就是那個小孩子睡著了。

S.FORM: azkaw ma mai ti ya biyat yau ti ya biyatna mzukat nani.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙不見了. 他的青蛙跑走了。
The frog was gone. His frog escaped.

S.FORM: taytaan na sunis a yau nani.
azkaw mana mai ti ya biyatta ka zin na sunis a yau zinna nani.
S.TRANSL: 小孩想說,我們的青蛙怎麼會不見了。
‘Alas, how come our frog was gone,’ thought the child.

S.FORM: maswat ti zinna sunis a yau ngid qapaR ta biyatna.
S.TRANSL: 小孩起來想要抓他的青蛙。
The child got up and wanted to catch his frog.

S.FORM: nani ngid qapaR ta biyatna.
S.TRANSL: (The child) wanted to catch his frog.

S.FORM: mai ti tapeRaskuan ngid qapaR nani.
S.TRANSL: (青蛙)不在瓶子裡. (他)想要抓(青蛙)。
(The frog) was not in the bottle. (He) wanted to catch (the frog).

S.FORM: mai ti ya biyat a yau zinna.
aizipna ta wasuna iza u tmayta ta biyatna ta mai ti nani.
S.TRANSL: 他看他的青蛙, 不見了。
(He) looked for his frog. It was gone.

S.FORM: wani zau sunis a zau nani.
akaw yau ta tanian smani biyat a yau biyat ce si kaba yu.
S.TRANSL: 那裡…不知道….那個青蛙...這是青蛙嗎?
There…I wonder…that frog…Is this a frog?

S.FORM: biyat.
taytaan na sunis a yau nani akaw yau ka biyat a yau tazian.
S.TRANSL: 小孩一直看…唉呦,我的青蛙在這裡。
The child saw…Alas, my frog was here.

S.FORM: zinna ti na Raytunguzan na wasuna ‘nay biyat ‘nay nani.
S.TRANSL: The dog barked at the frog.

S.FORM: pakalaanna ti na sunis a yau zinna tu.
yau ti lilizaq ti nani.
tutumuyanna ti biyat a yau zinna.
S.TRANSL: (He) played the frog in his hands.

S.FORM: na sunis qenalizaqan zinna.
nani wiya ti mlizaq ti ya sunis a yau yau ti ya biyatna nani.
S.TRANSL: 小孩很高興,(因為)青蛙找到了。
The child was happy (because) his frog had been found.

S.FORM: syazi tazian nani.
S.TRANSL: At this point (when it comes here).

S.FORM: Raytutunguz ti ya wasuna za.
mlizaq ti ya sunisna ya sunis a yau zinna.
azkaw biyatku yau ti pakalaanta zinna.
mlizaq ti ya sunis a yau zinna.
tazian nani wani wasu a zau nani Raytutunguz zinna.
S.TRANSL: It is the dog that barked.

S.FORM: nian ti smani biyatna mai ti ya biyatna.
S.TRANSL: 不知道他的青蛙在哪裡. 他的青蛙不見了。
I don’t know where his frog is. His frog was gone.

S.FORM: Raytunguz a wasu a yau zinna.
wiya ti tazenaan sayza mnangnangiw ya biyat a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙可能去水田游泳了。
Maybe the frog left for the paddy field and swam there.

S.FORM: mdaydaw ti ya sunis a yau zinna.
azkaw nian ti ya biyat ta mana mai ti ka.
S.TRANSL: 唉呦, 我們的青蛙在哪裡? 為什麼不見了?
Alas, where was our frog? How come it was gone.

S.FORM: mRaRiw ti zin na sunis a yau zinna nani.
S.TRANSL: ‘(The frog) ran away,’ thought the child.

S.FORM: yau tazian nani bawbawaanna ti ya wasuna sikakabal tu wasuna bawbawa zinna.
S.TRANSL: 這邊, (小孩)抱起了狗,對他的狗碎碎念。
Here, (the child) held his dog in the arms and nagged at his dog.

S.FORM: ya mai ti ya biyatna zinna.
wani tazi tazian ti nani.
yau ti ya sunis a yau qmRaRas.
qeqeRasanna na mai zinna.
yau wasuna mRaytungtunguz.
mai zinna nani.
kaw quniakita mai ti ya biyatta zinna nani.
S.TRANSL: ‘我們怎麼辦?我們的青蛙不見了’小孩這樣想。
‘What could we do? Our frog was gone,’ thought the child.

S.FORM: syazi tazian nani.
S.TRANSL: At this point (when it comes here).

S.FORM: tapapaRinan nani.
yau ti zinna ya yau a dubu na penay zinna.
penay tababaw na paRin zinna nani.
S.TRANSL: There were bees in the tree.

S.FORM: yau ti ya wasuna mRaytungtunguz zinna tu penay a yau zinna.
S.TRANSL: The dog was barking at the bees.

S.FORM: nani wani sunis a yau nani akaw manga ita qaRatanna sayza nani.
S.TRANSL: The child was afraid that they might be bitten (by the bees).

S.FORM: qmubet ti sunis a yau zinna.
ya lazatna penay a yau zinna tazian nani ngidanna zaqis na wasu ‘nay penay a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: The dog wanted to climb up to (do something with) the bees.

S.FORM: yau ti ya biyat a yau pakalaanna sayza nani yau mlizaq ti zinna ya lazat ya sunis a yau.
S.TRANSL: The frog was found. The child felt happy.

S.FORM: kalaanna ti ya biyatna nani.
wani penay a yau mlalsit ti lazatna nani.
S.TRANSL: 蜜蜂一個接一個跑出來。
The bees went out (of the beehive) one by one.

S.FORM: Raytungtunguzanna wasuna na muRing ti zinna ya lazatna.
S.TRANSL: The dog was barking. The person (the child) was crying.

S.FORM: maytis qaqaRatan na penay sayza.
S.TRANSL: They were afraid that they might be bitten by the bees.

S.FORM: nani syazi tazian nani.
S.TRANSL: At this point (when it comes here).

S.FORM: yau ti ya biyat a yau nangnangiw ta zenaan zinna izau.
S.TRANSL: The frog was swimming in the paddy field.

S.FORM: nani wani wasu a zau nani tanuzanna ti na penay sayza nani.
S.TRANSL: It was the dog that the bees were chasing.

S.FORM: maytis ti ya wasu a yau ngid zaqis ngid zaqis tu paRinna.
S.TRANSL: The dog was scared and wanted to climb up the tree.

S.FORM: Rayngu nani.
wani sunis a zau nani yau ti tapapaRin wiya ti mzaqis tapaRinanna sunisna yau sunis a yau zinna.
S.TRANSL: 在樹這邊. 小孩爬上樹。
At the tree. The child climbed up the tree.

S.FORM: maytis tu penay.
syazi tazian nani.
S.TRANSL: At this point (when it comes here).

S.FORM: tmayta ti tu adam a sunis a yau zinna nani.
yau pama penay a zau tentenbaseR zinna tmanuz tu wasuna.
S.TRANSL: 蜜蜂還在飛,追著他的狗。
The bees were still flying, chasing his dog.

S.FORM: nani azkaw qunian ti yau a adam.
S.TRANSL: Alas, how come there was a bird.

S.FORM: yau a penay na zinna na sunsunis suzitan ti zinna qenaytisan.
S.TRANSL: 有蜜蜂. 小孩(因為)害怕就掉下去了。
There were bees. The child fell down out of fear.

S.FORM: matatanaq ti ta wasuna zinna.
S.TRANSL: (The child) got separated from his dog.

S.FORM: yau a wasuna mRaytungtunguz.
maRiw maytis tu penay zinna.
S.TRANSL: (It) ran away (because it) was afraid of the bees.

S.FORM: nani wani zau nani azkaw qunian ti yau a adam.
S.TRANSL: Alas, what should we do? There was a bird.

S.FORM: manga iku qaRatanna manga iku dudutanna adam zinna sayza na maytis a sunis a zau zinna.
S.TRANSL: ‘我怕被咬,被鳥叮’小孩這樣想. 小孩很害怕。
‘I am afraid of being bitten…being stung by the bird,’ thought the child. The child was scared.

S.FORM: tazian nani nian ti smani wasuna.
S.TRANSL: 不知道他的狗到哪去了。
I don’t know where his dog was.

S.FORM: syazi tazian nani.
S.TRANSL: At this point (when it comes here),

S.FORM: qu qmRas ti zinna ya sunis a yau Ras qmRas ta wasuna sayza.
S.TRANSL: Perhaps the child was yelling at his dog.

S.FORM: ya wasuna maynep zinna.
nani qaqaRasanna wasuna na mai yau biyat taytaanna tamdawudan ya biyat a yau zinna.
S.TRANSL: 小孩叫狗, 青蛙在遠方看小孩。
The child was yelling at the dog. The frog was looking at the child from afar.

S.FORM: qmRas ta wasuna qmRas ta biyat a yau sayza ta biyatna ya sunis a zau haw nani.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩叫他的狗和青蛙。
This child was calling his dog and the frog.

S.FORM: syazi tazian nani.
S.TRANSL: At this point (when it comes here),

S.FORM: yau ti ya sunis a yau situRku tmayta.
S.TRANSL: The child looked down and saw…

S.FORM: ta yau a wasuta ka.
mai mai ya wasuta mai mRaRiw ya wasuta.
S.TRANSL: The dog did not run away.

S.FORM: mai qaRatan na penay.
S.TRANSL: (The dog) was not bitten by the bees.

S.FORM: mai wasuna mai ka tazian tu wasu.
yau a wasuta mai qaRatan na penay zin na sunis a yau zinna.
S.TRANSL: 狗沒有被蜜蜂咬,小孩這樣想。
‘The dog was not bitten by the bees,’ thought the child.

S.FORM: syazi tazian na yau ti ya siRmuq zinna.
S.TRANSL: At this point (when it comes here), there was a deer.

S.FORM: masulun tu wasuna ya siRmuq a yau.
S.TRANSL: The deer was with his dog.

S.FORM: wani siRmuq a yau nani.
nengi sayza na bebabaanna ti na na.
sunis a yau babaanna ti na siRmuq a sunis a yau zinna.
S.TRANSL: The deer carried the child on the back.

S.FORM: tazian maytis tu penay sayza.
S.TRANSL: Perhaps (the child) was afraid of the bees.

S.FORM: nani zau nani akaw penay a zau naquni smani benababaanna sunis a yau tu qabaw nani .
S.TRANSL: 唉呦,有蜜蜂. 我不知道小孩怎麼跑到鹿的背上。
Alas, there were bees. I don’t know how the child mounted the cattle.

S.FORM: siRmuq a yau suzitan ti sunis a yau qenalizaqan.
S.TRANSL: 鹿太高興,小孩就掉下去。
The child fell down because the deer was too happy.

S.FORM: nayau a lanasna na biyat a zau tu lazatna.
S.TRANSL: 他的故事就是那樣,(關於)他的青蛙對他的主人。
His story is like this, (about) his frog to his owner.

S.FORM: nani tazian ti nani.
yau ti tazian nani.
yau ti ya lazatna.
mlilizaq ti sayza nani.
suzitan ti lazat tu nian smani Raynguanku.
S.TRANSL: 人還是什麼跌倒,我也不知道。
The person or something else fell. I am not sure.

S.FORM: lazatna ay lazat sayzi yau limana nani.
mlizaq ti sayza.
yau siRmuq a yau situRku tata zinna.
S.TRANSL: The deer was looking down at him.

S.FORM: tazian.
syazi tazian nani.
S.TRANSL: At this point (when it comes here),

S.FORM: qa mlizaq ti.
yau ti ya ya wasuna nani.
babaap bebabaanna ti na wasu a yau.
yubaanna ti ta uRuanna zinna ya wasu a yau.
S.TRANSL: The deer placed the dog on the nape.

S.FORM: qenalizaqan zinna.
biyat a yau nani wi smasaqay sayza.
S.TRANSL: Perhaps the frog left and played around.

S.FORM: tazenaan tazanzanuman.
S.TRANSL: In the paddy fields, at the waterside.

S.FORM: zau nani qu naRin isu Raytunguz.
qalimekka.
zin na sun sunis a yau zinna ya wasuna.
S.TRANSL: The child said to his dog.

S.FORM: naRin mRaytungtunguz qalimekka zinna.
yau ti tazian nani.
yau niania smani ya pengpengkedan na wasuna.
S.TRANSL: 不知道他的狗左顧右盼看什麼。
I don’t know what his dog was looking around at.

S.FORM: nian smani ngidan na wasuna zinna wasu na sunis a yau.
S.TRANSL: I don’t know what his dog wanted.

S.FORM: yau tazian nani.
yau ti m tmayta ta wasuna zinna.
yau ti ya biyat uzusa ti ya biyat a yau zinna.
qmeRas tu ‘daqna sayza ya biyat a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 可能這隻青蛙叫了其他的青蛙。
Perhaps the frog called other frogs.

S.FORM: malusiq nani uzusa ti ya biyat a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 原本只有一隻, 變成兩隻青蛙。
Originally, there was one frog, but there were two frogs now.

S.FORM: yau ti tmayta ya sunis a yau aizipna ta wasuna.
S.TRANSL: The child was looking at his dog.

S.FORM: qenalizaqan tmayta ta biyatna ta uzusa ti.
S.TRANSL: (小孩)很高興看到他的青蛙…變成兩隻。
(The child) was glad to see his frog…two frogs.

S.FORM: zau nani sunis a yau nani yau ti Ray wasuna qaya lilizaq ti sayza tmayta ta wa ta biyatna nani.
S.TRANSL: 小孩和他的狗可能很高興看到他們的青蛙。
Perhaps the child and his dog were glad to see their frog.

S.FORM: wiya ti mwaza zinna biyatna.
S.TRANSL: The number of frogs became greater.

S.FORM: mwaza ti ya biyatna na mlizaq ti ya sunis a yau tmayta ta biyat a yau zinna.
S.TRANSL: 有很多青蛙.小孩很高興看到青蛙。
There were many frogs. The child was glad to see the frogs.

S.FORM: spaR qmRas a.
yau malusiq a biyat a yau nani.
waliw ti mazmun a biyat a yau zinna.
S.TRANSL: However, there were many frogs now.

S.FORM: zau nani qu mlizaq ti iku nengi ti anemku.
S.TRANSL: I feel happy. I feel good.

S.FORM: zinna sayza tazian pasababaw tu lima sunis a yau zinna.
S.TRANSL: Here, the child raised his hands (to cheer).

S.FORM: yau ti ya mazmun a biyatna.
S.TRANSL: There were many of his frogs.

S.FORM: yau a wasuna.
mai naquni.
m yau Raybunan na biyatna mwaza ti biyatna na.
S.TRANSL: 他的青蛙站在那邊.有很多青蛙。
His frog stood there. There were many frogs.

S.FORM: mlizaq ti nani.
pasababaw ti tu lima sunis a zau zinna.
nayau.
nayau ma.
